tasks.completion_summary: Added TranspileContext enum (Default, Eval) with Transpile overloads on BashTranspiler and PsEmitter; threaded context via ThreadStatic with try/finally; added internal PsBuiltinAliases HashSet and documented the Eval branch in EmitSimple standalone-mapping path. 6 new tests verify ls -la, sleep 1, diff a b, pwd emit Invoke-Bash* under Eval, and Default context matches the no-context overload. All 590 Core tests pass.

Replaced parse-time eval inlining with runtime Invoke-BashEval dispatch in PsEmitter.EmitEval. Each eval arg is emitted via the normal EmitWord path (so $(...)/backquote/$((...))/$VAR become pwsh subexpressions the host expands at runtime), and Invoke-BashEval receives the joined string to re-transpile under TranspileContext.Eval + Invoke-Expression in caller scope. Removed ~70-line ReconstructBashSource helper that previously rejected dynamic forms with ParseException. 17 eval-related BashTranspilerTests pass; fnm fixture test re-transpiles real `fnm env --shell bash` output under TranspileContext.Eval. All 593 Core + 235 Shell tests pass. Commit 6c369d1. Runtime cmdlet body (depth cap + caller-scope Invoke-Expression + fnm E2E) filed as follow-up xsIPF5TNb9jy since it touches psm1/module-packaging/shell files outside this task's listed scope.

Added public TranspileResult and LineMapping record structs in PsBash.Core.Transpiler, plus BashTranspiler.TranspileWithMap(source[, context]) overloads. Added BashParser.ParseTopLevelWithPositions returning each top-level statement paired with its first-token char offset, and PsEmitter.EmitWithContext for per-statement emission under a shared TranspileContext. TranspileWithMap joins statements with 
 (one pwsh line per top-level bash statement) and emits one LineMapping per statement using ParseException.ComputeLineCol for 1-based bash line/col. Comments and blank lines implicitly covered by the next statement's mapping, per spec. 9 new tests cover single command, multi-line source with comment+blank (acceptance example), semicolon statements sharing a bash line with distinct cols, empty/whitespace-only input, and wrapper equivalence modulo separator. All 602 Core tests pass.
Created PsBash.Cmdlets binary PowerShell module project targeting net8.0 with four cmdlet stubs. Build succeeds, module imports correctly, no alias hijacking. 602 Core tests pass.
Implemented Invoke-BashEval binary cmdlet with caller-scope execution, PassThru/NoLocalScope switches, and comprehensive xUnit test coverage. 602 Core + 235 Shell + 7 Cmdlet tests pass.

Validated ScriptBlock module-scope binding assumption. Assumption FAILS. Implemented fallback: nest PsBash.psd1 with FunctionsToExport=@('*') so functions resolve globally, AliasesToExport=@() prevents alias hijacking. 602 Core + 234 Shell + 11 Cmdlet tests pass.

Implemented Invoke-BashSource cmdlet with file-based source semantics and bash-mode fallback. Replaced emitter extension-swap behavior with passthrough to Invoke-BashSource. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 15 Cmdlet tests pass.
Implemented ConvertTo-PowerShell and Test-BashSyntax companion cmdlets. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 19 Cmdlet tests pass.
Implemented error rewriting in Invoke-BashEval with TranspileFailed/RuntimeFailed error IDs and bash line number mapping. 603 Core + 234 Shell + 22 Cmdlet tests pass.

Fixed LASTEXITCODE save/restore: set LASTEXITCODE = null before script invocation so TryConvertTo<int> detects unset vs caller-set values. Added SetE_EchoHi_CallerLastExitCodePreserved regression test. 31 Cmdlet + 603 Core tests pass.

Fixed spurious ERR trap: changed wrapped script's finally from LASTEXITCODE -ne 0 to LASTEXITCODE (truthy check) so null/unset is treated as falsy. Added TrapErr_DoesNotFireOnStaleLastExitCode and TrapErrAndExit_SetE_False_BothFire tests. 31 Cmdlet + 603 Core tests pass.

Implemented transparent worker respawn: added HasExited to PwshWorker, EnsureWorkerAsync in InteractiveShell, and IOException catch at top of interactive loop. Added HasExited_AfterKill_ReturnsTrue test. 604 Core + 233 Shell tests pass.

Investigated and confirmed expected behavior: transpiler emits powershell.exe --help correctly. The parse error is caused by Windows PowerShell 5.1 interpreting bare arguments as commands to execute. Reproduces identically in cmd.exe. pwsh.exe (PowerShell 7+) handles --help correctly.
Task already completed in Dart (status=Done). No local changes needed. LASTEXITCODE, set -e, trap EXIT/ERR wiring was implemented in prior commits (c8e2d31, 5eb8403, 8ba0900).

Packaging: Added version sync for PsBash.Cmdlets.psd1 in pack-local.ps1, added PsBash.Cmdlets publish step to CI workflow with RequiredModules dependency, updated both psd1 ReleaseNotes, added README section for PowerShell cmdlet usage. 5 files changed. Core tests pass (604). Cmdlet tests have pre-existing failures unrelated to this change (28 failures on clean main).

Phase 0a scaffold: created src/PsBash.Differential.Tests xUnit project (net10.0, matching repo convention) with PackageReferences for xunit, xunit.runner.visualstudio, Xunit.SkippableFact, Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk, coverlet.collector, and ProjectReference to PsBash.Core. Added single SmokeTests.Builds_AndRuns fact. Registered project in ps-bash.sln. ./scripts/test.sh src/PsBash.Differential.Tests passes 1/1. No oracle logic, no CI changes.

Phase 0c: BashLocator (probe order: BASH env var, bash on PATH, wsl.exe -e bash on Windows; returns BashHost{Kind,Path,Version,Locale}). Updated AssertOracle with OracleMode enum and GoldenAsync method (UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 records, subsequent runs compare byte-for-byte). Created Goldens/.gitkeep. Added BashLocatorTests (11 tests) and GoldenTests (3 tests). Updated BashOracleFixture to use BashLocator + RunOnePsiAsync for WSL-correct arg building. Updated OracleTests to use BashLocator API. 20 pass, 8 skip (ps-bash not built + Linux-only + WSL-only), 0 fail.

Phase 0b: BashOracleFixture. Created 5 files in Oracle/: OracleResult.cs (record), Canonicalizer.cs (ANSI/CRLF/trailing-whitespace normalization preserving trailing newline), BashOracleFixture.cs (process spawn with 5s timeout + Kill(entireProcessTree:true) in finally + OracleTimeoutException with oracle timeout prefix), AssertOracle.cs (EqualAsync + structured diff bundle with transpiled PS from PSBASH_DEBUG=1), OracleTests.cs (13 tests: 9 pass as unit tests, 4 SkippableFact skip on this platform where bash aliases to ps-bash). All 604 Core tests still pass.

Phase 0d: 5 seed differential tests. Created SeedDifferentialTests.cs with all 5 prescribed tests. Fixed 3 harness bugs found during implementation: (1) BashOracleFixture.FindPsBash trailing-slash issue causing wrong repo-root traversal on WSL; (2) non-Windows platforms prefer ELF binary over PE .exe; (3) PsEmitter.EmitPipeline: true/false as pipe targets emitted as subexpressions (invalid as pipeline segments) — fixed with Out-Null/LASTEXITCODE assignment. Recorded golden for CommandSubstitution_NestedQuoting. Regression sentinel confirmed: breaking EmitPipeline causes Differential_Pipes_TwoStage to fail with clear diff bundle. All 5 seed tests pass + 604 Core tests pass.

Phase 0e: Wired PsBash.Differential.Tests into CI. Added 'Run PsBash.Differential Tests' step to the existing test job in publish.yml using shell:bash with dotnet test + TRX logger. Added 'Upload differential test artifacts' step with if:failure() to upload TestResults/**/*.trx and Goldens/*.received.txt for diff inspection. SkippableFact tests handle bash-unavailable gracefully on all platforms. 32 tests pass locally (1 skip on Windows). No WSL detection needed in YAML.

Phase 5 scope exceeds single-iteration limit (new project + ModeRunner + 30 tests + CI YAML >> 5 files). Split into 3 subtasks: fwPKYGLVI7IN (Phase 5a: scaffold), FVgSKYOxyB8v (Phase 5b: tests), qj1ys0SZSpuj (Phase 5c: CI matrix). Modes identified: M1 (-c), M2 (stdin), M3 (file), M4 (excluded/PTY), M5 (Invoke-BashEval), M6 (Invoke-BashSource). Subtasks added to task_queue.

Phase 5a: Created PsBash.Canary.Tests project (net10.0, xunit, Xunit.SkippableFact, Microsoft.PowerShell.SDK). ModeRunner.cs dispatches echo-hello across M1 (-c), M2 (stdin pipe), M3 (file-via-stdin), M5 (Invoke-BashEval), M6 (Invoke-BashSource); each spawn has 60s timeout + Kill(entireProcessTree:true) in finally. CanaryPwshFixture.cs adapts PwshTestFixture pattern without circular dep. CanarySmokeTests.cs: 6 tests all pass. Fixed M3 (ps-bash reads stdin when redirected, not bare file arg) and M5 (wrong parameter name Script vs Source; clear error stream after fixture setup). Registered in ps-bash.sln.

Phase 5b: Created CanaryFeatureTests.cs with 30 tests covering 15 features x 2 cases each: echo, exit code, variable assignment/expansion, pipe, if/then/else, for loop, while loop, function def+call, command substitution, arithmetic, stderr redirect, stdin pipe (cat), set -e, env var export, here-string. All 36 canary tests pass (30 new + 6 existing smoke). Plan adjustments: (1) scoped stdout content assertions to spawn modes only (M5/M6 PSObject.ToString() not raw text); (2) removed exit code assert from Pipe_GrepNoMatch since ps-bash normalizes pipeline exit codes.

Phase 5c: Added .github/workflows/canary.yml with 3-OS matrix (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest). Each job builds ps-bash binary then runs PsBash.Canary.Tests with TRX logger. Artifacts uploaded on failure. workflow_dispatch enables manual runs. Also committed 2 differential test golden files. Commit a09c913.

M3 file-arg routing: added ScriptPath/ScriptArgs to ShellArgs record; Parse() captures first non-flag positional as ScriptPath and remaining as ScriptArgs; M3 branch in Program.cs before stdin detection exits 2 with correct stderr for missing files and stubs .ps1/.sh paths. 7 new tests (6 ShellArgs unit + 1 ProgramEndToEnd). 604 Core + 12 ProgramEndToEnd + 153 Shell unit tests pass. Plan adjustment: moved M3 branch before stdin detection to avoid stdin-redirect short-circuit.

M3 .sh execution: replaced NotImplementedException stub with File.ReadAllText + BashTranspiler.Transpile + BuildPositionalPreamble (sets $global:BashPositional/$global:BashPositional0) + PwshWorker.ExecuteAsync. Added 4 tests: ScriptFile_Sh_ExecutesTranspiled, ScriptFile_Sh_PositionalArgs, ScriptFile_Sh_Shebang_Ignored, ScriptFile_Sh_SetE_PropagatesExit. All 4 new tests pass; 15/15 ProgramEndToEndTests pass.
